source.sourcePath: raw/sources/RA/04_제품별 인허가 진행 문서/01_HAD1717MC(MG)/▶ CE MDD/인허가 준비 자료(초기)/19. 클린룸 밸리데이션 자료/헤파필터 성적서.xlsx

sourceSummary.oneLine: Filter test report for 24 HEPA FILTER units, model HL- 610.610.150, dated 6/7/19.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Supports cleanroom HEPA filter validation records by documenting airflow, pressure loss, P.A.O collection efficiency, leak test, and visual condition results.
keyPoints: Test standard list includes airflow 28 cmm, initial pressure loss 25.4 mmaq or less, P.A.O test at 0.3㎛ with 99.97% or higher, and visual condition checks.
Serial numbers 190607001 through 190607024 are listed with leak test OK and visual condition OK.

evidence.claim: The document title is FILTER TEST REPORT.
The report date shown in the source is 6/7/19.
The tested item name is HEPA FILTER.
The listed model is HL- 610.610.150 with quantity 24 EA.
The test standard list specifies airflow of 28 cmm.
The initial pressure loss criterion is 25.4 mmaq or less.
The P.A.O test criterion is 0.3㎛ and 99.97% or higher.
Serial numbers 190607001 through 190607024 are listed in the report.
All listed serial-number rows show LEAK TEST as OK and visual condition as OK.
The issuer contact block names ㈜파란필터산업 and an address in Hwaseong-si, Gyeonggi-do.

reviewFlags.reason: No revision or version is present in the source text.
No regulatory authority or jurisdiction is identified in the source text.
No formal external standard number is stated; the source only provides a test standard list with acceptance criteria.
The date appears as 6/7/19 without an explicit YYYY-MM-DD format.
